metadata.description: This individual, appearing to be in their 40s and presenting as male, has a medium-deep skin tone with visible pores and some minor textural variations. Their face is oval-shaped with a defined jawline. The hair is dark brown, pulled back into a bun, with a receding hairline and some visible graying at the temples. The eyes are light green, almond-shaped, and set slightly wide apart. Thick, dark eyebrows have a gentle arch. The nose is medium-sized with a straight bridge and a slightly rounded tip. The mouth features medium-full lips, with the upper lip slightly thinner than the lower. A short, neatly trimmed beard and mustache cover the chin and upper lip, and there are several small moles or beauty marks visible on the cheeks and forehead. The person's features suggest a mixed heritage. They are looking off to the left with a subtle, pleasant smile, and their head is angled slightly upwards and to the left.
